home.title: Technology with purpose, engineering with
home.description: I'm José Pedro Schardosim Simão, a senior software engineer and professor with over 15 years of experience creating clean, scalable, and user-centered applications.

philosophy.paragraph1: I work at the intersection of research, education, innovation, and software engineering, seeking to bridge academia and industry in a practical and applied way. I transform theoretical knowledge into real solutions, combining methodological rigor with technical execution.
philosophy.paragraph2: I believe innovation happens when there is dialogue between method, training, and market, and I work to build this bridge through applied research, technology education, and development of systems with concrete impact.

blog.description: Articles and reflections on technology, software engineering and AI-driven development

stack.title: Stack
stack.description: An overview of the technologies, languages and tools that make up my stack.

techs.typescript: My main tool for complex and type-safe applications.
techs.python: APIs, automation, data processing and AI integrations.
techs.ruby: Scripts, automation and legacy system maintenance.
techs.tailwind: Fast UI with utilities and design consistency.
techs.fastapi: Async APIs with OpenAPI and typing.
techs.rails: Agile backend web development with convention over configuration.
techs.laravel: Rapid PHP application development with good structure and productivity.
techs.bedrock: Agents, tool use, integrations and architecture of apps with foundation models.
techs.openai: Building applications with LLMs, tools and multimodal flows.
techs.redis: Cache, rate limiting and simple queues.
techs.docker: Containers, multi-stage builds and dev/prod consistency.
techs.githubactions: CI/CD with workflows, gates and releases.
techs.azure: Services and integrations in corporate environments.
techs.opentelemetry: Traces, metrics and logs with standard instrumentation.
techs.kibana: Dashboards, exploration and visualization of logs/metrics.
techs.sonarqube: Code quality, metrics and static analysis.
techs.jest: Unit and integration tests in JS/TS.
techs.locust: Load and performance tests with realistic scenarios.

publications.title: Publications
publications.description: Published articles, conference proceedings and book chapters.
